code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if in_tok and has_digit
        let signed = if neg
          -val
        else
          val
        end
        if signed > 0
          sum = sum + signed * 2
        end
      end
      in_tok = false
      neg = false
      val = 0
      has_digit = false
    else
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        neg = false
        val = 0
        has_digit = false
        if b == 45
          neg = true
        else if b == 43
          neg = false
        else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          val = b - 48
          has_digit = true
        end
      else
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
          has_digit = true
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok and has_digit
    let signed = if neg
      -val
    else
      val
    end
    if signed > 0
      sum = sum + signed * 2
    end
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
